prospectQuestionContext: Sounds good. When are you free for a call?
originalOutboundBody:
Hi Alex,

Pipeline shouldn't reset every quarter when a project wraps.

We fix that. Worth a quick call?

Doug
operatorAnswer: Sounds great. Looking forward to walking you through everything and showing you exactly how things would work for your specific situation. Pick a time that suits: {calendly_link}
aiDraftBody: Happy to jump on a call. Here is a link to book a time that works for you. Looking forward to connecting.
orgPositioningDocument: MargenticOS is a done-for-you outbound pipeline service built for solo and micro-team B2B consultants with a proven offer but no predictable way to fill their calendar.
expected_behaviour: Gate should skip with 'booking_link_only_minimal_context' reason. The operator answer is 27 words total (passes Rule 1 word-count floor of 20), but after stripping {calendly_link} the remaining text is only 26 words — under the 30-word threshold. Rule 4 fires. Returns [].
